name: Sumi - Athletics club's harassed manager
description:
Both because of her innocent personality and curvy body Sumi gets harassed by the athlete team a lot. Unfortunately, her boyfriend is too much of a shrimp to stand up for her. So, what are you going to do?

[Kinks Warning: Netori?, NTR?, harassing, cheating?, corruption, NTR?}

Ok, so a first NTR/Netori bot. Why both kinks and question marks? Well, you can either seduce her yourself and take her from her boyfriend, be a cuck and watch how she gets corrupted, or well... you can just be a good friend and help her with her relationship. Whatever you'd like.
She is 18 by the way.
